title: Quotation Engineer[Woodland/ cost estimation, quotations, or manufacturing processes/ AutoCAD, SolidWorks/CNC machining and general manufacturing operations.]
description:
Key Responsibilities
  • Analyze customer requirements, technical specifications, and engineering drawings to develop precise cost quotations.
  • Evaluate material, labor, and production costs to formulate competitive pricing structures.
  • Collaborate with engineering, procurement, and production teams to develop cost-effective and feasible solutions.
  • Review Requests for Quotation (RFQs) to assess alignment with manufacturing capabilities and resource availability.
  • Prepare and present detailed cost breakdowns and pricing proposals for customer review.
  • Ensure compliance with industry standards, quality benchmarks, and internal company policies in all cost estimations.
  • Identify and recommend cost-saving measures and process improvements to enhance operational efficiency and profitability.
  • Maintain an organized and up-to-date quotation database, including pricing history and records.
  • Communicate and negotiate with suppliers and vendors to secure competitive rates for materials and services.
  • Provide technical support to the sales team, including pricing justifications and insight into production feasibility.
  • Monitor and follow up on submitted quotations to convert opportunities into confirmed orders.
  • Stay informed on industry trends, material costs, and market conditions to maintain competitive pricing strategies.
Requirements
  • Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Prior experience in cost estimation, quotations, or manufacturing processes is an advantage.
  • Familiarity with AutoCAD, SolidWorks, or other design software is desirable.
  • Strong analytical skills and keen attention to detail in pricing and cost estimation.
  • Ability to interpret technical drawings and engineering documents accurately.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel, Word, Outlook, and PowerPoint.
  • Capable of working effectively under pressure and meeting tight deadlines in a dynamic environment.
  • Solid understanding of CNC machining and general manufacturing operations.
  • Strong negotiation skills, with experience in sourcing and vendor communication.

postedCompany.description:
Linkedcorp is a professional recruitment firm specializing in providing comprehensive talent solutions. Our services range from general staffing, executive search, temporary & contract hiring, project hiring, and HR outsourcing services, ensuring that we are equipped to meet the diverse needs of organizations of all sizes. With a team of experienced and knowledgeable professionals, we are committed to delivering results that exceed expectations and help companies achieve their strategic goals.  


Our commitment to excellence and delivering value to our clients sets us apart in the industry. We are dedicated to building long-term partnerships and providing a positive experience to all of our clients. Whether you're looking to expand your team or take your company to the next level, LinkedCorp is the partner you can trust to help you achieve your goals.
